title: Fragments of Truth
overview: Our faith is based on the New Testament – but can we trust it?  Skeptics say no, arguing that the gospel manuscripts have been doctored to push a theological agenda. Join Dr. Craig Evans as he takes this claim head-on, traveling the globe to track down the oldest surviving New Testament manuscripts.

trailers.title: Fragments of Truth Trailer - In U.S. Cinemas 4/24
